# Regalia Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![banner-logo](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/regalia-credit-cards-desktop-banner?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you
  * [Card Benefits & Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card#cards "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card#b "Card Management & Controls")
  * [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card#a "Frequently Asked Questions")

![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Card Benefits and Features
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Complimentary Airport Lounge Access: Up to 2 complimentary lounge access vouchers every quarter for Self and Addon member based on spends of minimum ₹ 1 lakh per calendar quarter.
  * Priority Pass: You can apply for a priority pass for Self and Add-on member after using your Regalia credit card for minimum 4 times and avail up to 6 Complimentary Lounge Access per year, outside India.
  * Dining Privileges with Good Food Trail Program and get up to 7.5% discount on partner restaurant restaurants via Swiggy Dineout on paying with HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card.
  * 24 X 7 Exclusive Concierge Services on your HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card. call us: Call us on: 1860 425 1188 (India) / Email ID: regalia.support@smartbuyoffers.co(opens in a new tab)
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/RC1) for list of domestic lounges, to be checked before approaching an airport lounge.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_Regalia_Priority_Pass1/Regalia_Priority_Pass.aspx) to apply for Priority Pass for self and add-on members.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card "View More")
![Regalia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### CashBack Benefits
  * Link your HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card on PayZapp -
  * Earn Additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on Utility Bills, Mobile Recharges and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on Shopping in-app over 200 plus brands
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card "View More")
![Regalia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Earn up to 5x Reward Points on booking flight tickets, hotel stays, gift vouchers and more via [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/regalia)
  * Earn 4 Reward Points on every ₹200 spent
  * Milestone Memberships/ Vouchers by logging in to the dedicated Regalia SmartBuy Portal with a real time Milestone dashboard.
  * Get up to 50 days of interest free Credit from the date of purchase. (subject to submission of the charge by the Merchant).
  * HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card comes with an option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase. To know more [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi)
  * Insurance/Comprehensive protection: Accidental air death cover worth ₹1 crore, Emergency overseas hospitalization up to ₹ 15 lakh, Credit Liability cover: Up to ₹9 lakh ( Click Here to update your nominee details.)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card "View More")
![Regalia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Accidental air death cover worth Rs. 1 Crore (USD 125,000)
  * Emergency overseas hospitalization: up to Rs. 15 lakhs (USD 18,750)
  * Lost Card Liability Cover : Upto Rs 9 lakhs
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx?_ga=2.26251124.810244122.1556024278-537237991.1553082495) to update your nominee details.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/pdfs/hdfc-ergo-general-insurance-company-limited.pdf) for claim procedure and policy details.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card "View More")
![Regalia Gold Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### MyCards
  2. ### Fees and renewal
  3. ### Redemption Value & Limit
  4. ### Added Delights
  5. ### Contactless Payments
  6. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card
  * Single Interface   
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Fastag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking   
Simple interface to track all your spends 
  * Reward Points   
View and redeem points at the push of a button 


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and renewal 
  * Joining/renewal membership fee of ₹2,500 plus applicable taxes.
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of HDFC Bank Regalia Fees and Charges.


**Regalia Credit Card benefits:**
  * Welcome benefit of 2500 reward points
  * Renewal fee benefit of 2500 reward points (applicable only after the membership fee is realised and not applicable when the fee is waived) 


*Terms & conditions apply  
Note: For card sourced starting 01-11- 2020, the below T&C are applicable   
The HDFC Bank reserves the right to cancel the Credit Card in case the card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (six) months after prior written notice is sent to the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the HDFC Bank.
[Check Now](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/fees-and-charges)
![Fees and renewal ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Value & Limit 
You can redeem your Reward Points on [Smartbuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/regalia) or NetBanking.
  * Reward points can be redeemed across various categories as follows:

  
| 1 Reward point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| Flights and hotel bookings  | ₹0.5  |  
| Airmiles conversion  | up to 0.5 airmiles  |  
| Products and Voucher  | up to ₹0.35  |  
| Cashback  | up to ₹0.15  |  
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/pdfs/rp-regalia.pdf) to know more.
![Card Control and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Added Delights 
  * **Zero Lost Card Liability:** Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre 
  * **Revolving Credit:** Enjoy Revolving Credit on your HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card at nominal interest rate. Refer to the Fees and Charges section to know more. [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/fees-and-charges)
  * **Foreign Currency Markup:** 3.5% on all your foreign currency spends..
  * **Safety:** Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Credit & Safety ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payments 
  * The HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets.*   
(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.)


![Contactless Payments ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/personal-mitc) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Terms and Conditions ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  How can HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Cardholder raise the claim with insurance partner HDFC Ergo? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Cardholders can directly raise the claim with HDFC ERGO within 130 days from the date of loss. HDFC Ergo Contact details:
a. For Emergency Medical Expenses - Toll-Free: plus800 08250825 (International Toll-Free - accessible from outside India) / 01204507250 (Chargeable)
b. Email: bankclaims@hdfcergo.com(opens in a new tab)
c. Address: A and H Claims Inward Team, HDFC
###  What are the Terms and Conditions? 
All the above insurance covers are available to the Primary cardholder.
  * Liability on lost card will start from the date of dispatch of the card up to 30 days, whereas Air Accident/ Emergency Medical Expenses will start from the date of activation of the card (means first POS transaction/cash withdrawal by the cardholder)
  * Liability on lost card covered to the extent of 900,000 for 2 days before the date of block and 30 days post the date of the block.
  * Terrorism is specifically excluded under the policy.
  * Travel Insurance provided under the policy shall not be valid for procuring a visa.
  * Travel Insurance provided shall be valid for International Travel only. Maximum Trip Duration is restricted to 30 Days.
  * Fraudulent transactions done by a person known to the cardholder are specifically excluded.
  * HDFC Bank does not provide insurance coverage. Exclusions/Limitations are applicable per the policies issued by the Insurance Company with whom the Bank has tied up.


###  Does the HDFC Bank HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card provide a payment option through a contactless card? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card enables contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets.  
Please note that in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN.
###  Spends from which period will be considered for this offer?
Spending your Regalia credit card from January 1, 2021, till March 31, 2021, will be considered, and every calendar quarter thereafter.
###  What is the annual Membership fee/renewal applicable to the HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card? 
A membership fee/ Renewal fee of ₹2,500 /-plus Applicable Taxes applies to the HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card.
###  What happens if you have exceeded your complimentary visits via Priority Pass? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders exceeding 6 complimentary visits will be charged US $27 plus GST per visit.
###  What are the Reward Points redemption options available for the cardholder? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders can redeem Reward Points
  * For flight and hotel bookings via [SmartBuy (opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/regalia)
  * Curated Global experiences,
  * Premium vouchers,
  * Air Miles
  * Cashback.


###  When will the membership code be sent to all winners?
All winners will receive the promo code within one month of achieving the spending target. For example, if a customer has achieved 75,000 spent on February 10 2021, he will receive the membership code by March 10, 2021.
###  How to avail a Priority pass card?
You can apply for a Priority Pass for yourself or /and add on members after doing 4 retail transactions on your HDFC Bank HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card Credit. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_Regalia_Priority_Pass1/Regalia_Priority_Pass.aspx) to apply
###  Can you use a priority pass within India?
Using a Priority Pass in India will attract charges to your Credit Card. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/pdfs/t-c.pdf) for details.
###  What is the spend aggregation feature applicable to HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card? 
  * Cardholders earn 10,000 Reward Points on achieving annual spends of ₹5 lakh.


  * Cardholders earn an additional 5,000 Reward Points on achieving annual spends of ₹8 lakh in the same anniversary year.


For important Terms and Conditions of the annual spending benefit program, [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card/pdfs/rp-regalia.pdf).
###  How to apply for the Regalia Credit Card?
The sourcing of this card has been discontinued.
###  Do I have to register online in order to use the HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card Portal? 
Registration on the [portal(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/regalia) for Bank Regalia Credit Card is optional. You can access all the features and functionalities of the website without registration. However, all the transactions on the website need to be affected using the HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card. As a registered member, you will get the following benefits:
  * You do not have to provide details whenever you use the booking portal. 


  * You can view all your revenue and redemption bookings in one place.


###  How many base Reward Points do HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders earn?
You can earn up to 4 RP on retail spending for every ₹200 spent on the card. 
**Note - With effect from January 1, 2023,**
  * Reward points will not be accrued for rental pay transactions, property management services like rent, maintenance, packers and movers, and government transactions.
  * Reward points earned on grocery transactions will be capped at 2000 RP per calendar month.
  * Redemption of Reward Points for flights and hotel bookings on SmartBuy portal will be capped at 50,000 Reward Points per calendar month.
  * For rent payments made through third-party merchants, a fee of 1% of the total transaction amount will be levied from the second rental transaction of the calendar month.
  * If you conduct a transaction (in-store or online) in Indian currency at an international location or with a merchant located in India but registered overseas, a dynamic and static conversion markup fee of 1% will be charged.


###  How can HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders avail lounge access outside India?
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders can use a priority pass to access up to 6 complimentary international lounges for themselves and their add-ons. 
###  What happens if you have exceeded your complimentary lounge visits on your HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card? 
All visits exceeding the complimentary quota will be allowed at the lounge's discretion and chargeable by the lounge.
###  How can a card member enable Online, International and Contactless transactions? 
[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/enhanced-security-for-credit-cards-transactions) for detailed information
###  What is the domestic lounge access program on the HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card?
Up to 2 complimentary domestic lounge access vouchers every quarter on Smartbuy, for Primary and Addon subject to quarterly spends of Rs 1 lakh.
###  Does HDFC Bank HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card Credit Card provide travel assistance?
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders can customise their travel experiences with our 24/7 concierge Assistance. Toll-free no: 1860 425 1188, Email ID: HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card.support@smartbuyoffers.co(opens in a new tab)
###  Are existing HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card Cardholders also eligible for the membership? 
No, existing HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card cardholders i.e. those sourced before March 20, 2019, will not be eligible for the membership. 
###  How to avail this membership?
Spend ₹75,000 and more from your regalia credit card every calendar quarter from January 1, 2021, to March 31, 2021.
###  What is the comprehensive protection feature of HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card Cardholders enjoy the following comprehensive protection on the card:
  * ₹1 crore air accidental death cover: Cover is applicable in case the cardholder shall sustain any air accident and suffer a bodily injury resulting in death within 12 months of the accident.


  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation up to ₹15 lakh is available to primary cardholders: This covers medical expenses due to Bodily Injury or sudden unexpected sickness only for international travel outside India.


  * Medical expenses incurred due to any pre-existing illness will not be covered.


###  What are the Terms and conditions with respect to the Reward Point Program? 
  * Only valid retail purchases qualify for Reward Points.
  * Reward Points will not be accrued for fuel transactions.
  * Reward Points are valid for only 2 years from the date of accumulation. For example, if you receive Reward Points in April 2019, they expire in April 2021.
  * EasyEMI and e-wallet loading transactions do not qualify for Reward Points.
  * Reward Points accrued will be reversed if a retail transaction is converted into SmartEMI.
  * The accrued Reward Points will be nullified if the credit card is not used for more than 365 days.
  * Reward Points accrued for insurance transactions are capped at a maximum of 2,000 points per month.


###  Who all are eligible for this offer? 
All Regalia credit cardholders are eligible for this offer.
###  What is the spend-based condition for membership fee reversal on the HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card? 
Membership fee will be waived on spends of ₹3 lakh in the anniversary year 
###  What are the eligibility criteria for availing a Zomato Pro Membership? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card holders, whether newly onboarded or upgraded on or after March 20, 2019 and before January 10, 2021, who have spent ₹75,000 within the first 90 days from the card setup date, are eligible for this membership.
###  How do I know the list of lounges providing complimentary domestic lounge access on HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card?
Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/hdfc-regalia-gold) to know the updated Visa / Mastercard complimentary lounge access list.
###  What is a Dineout Passport?
Dineout Passport membership is a dining programme that offers:  

  1. Minimum 25% off on the bill at 2000plus restaurants in 20 cities nationwide.
  2. 1plus1 on Buffet at 200 plus restaurants.
  3. Additional 5% off using Dineout Pay.
  4. Exclusive Access to Dineout Passport Experiences.
  5. Early Access to events and festivals such as GIRF, Gourmetlicious, etc


###  What is HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card Unified Portal and what does it provide? 
HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card unified portal is an exclusive portal for customers for travel, entertainment, and shopping bookings. Customers can make both flight/hotel bookings and also redeem rewards points against travel bookings using their credit card on this portal. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/regalia) to know more.
View More
